Okay okay... Third part of the fanfic... (FT. @LittleBeanieBoy, Daddy pig, Homunya and another guest)

Beanie woke up in the hospital, Looking around, Confused. DazzlesBeloved, The doctor, stepped in. "I fear that his condition is... Lethal... And he's hysterical pregnant." Daddy pig looked at the Doctor "L-lethal?!...." DazzlesBeloved sighed "yes... i am so sorry..." Daddy pig cried, grabbing Beanie's hand and squeezing it. Homunya stepped in, looking guilty. Daddy pig stepped in front of him "What do you want?!" Homunya rubbed his arm "i just came here to apolozige... To Beanie... I would like a few moments alone with him..." DazzlesBeloved nodded, dragging Daddy pig away from the scene. "Beanie... i know you can't really say anything right now but..." Homunya grabbed a new computer from his super bag, handing it to Beanie who couldn't move any muscles. "Here... take this..." Homunya accidentally let the computer fall onto Beanie's chest, " . WHY
